interpretation: The complete-evidence matrix is materially broader than the one-date pilot: 12 symbols, 3 event dates, 841 events, 786 complete-evidence rows.
Bullish_activity remained positive overall: 10d directional underlying avg +5.13%, hit 55.3%, long-option 10d avg +54.2%; however symbol-level results were not uniform.

Bearish_activity did not validate overall: 10d directional underlying avg -6.10%, hit 37.4%, long-option 10d avg -51.7%; bearish option abnormality likely needs stricter conditional filters or may be unreliable.
Direction-neutral path expansion remains plausible but not proven here because matched non-event controls were not included in this artifact.
Ambiguous classes remain non-directional diagnostics and must not be counted as signed proof.
Four endpoint hard blockers were retained as hard blockers: PFE 27.5 same-strike 2026-05-22 term-structure IV requests returned ThetaData HTTP 472 for 2026-04-24 and 2026-05-01.
promotion_boundary: Diagnostic only: broader than the one-date pilot but still one expiration family and bounded event-date set. Direction-neutral path expansion remains separate from directional proof; no model-layer promotion without broader dates/expiries and stability controls.
